title: Visiting the public library
story: I visited the downtown library on Thursday afternoon to return three overdue books. The librarian checked them in and I owed fifty cents in late fees. I paid the fee and browsed the new arrivals section. I picked out two novels and a cookbook, checked them out with my library card, and put them in my bag before heading home.
notes: Routine errand, minor failure event from overdue books but no interpersonal dynamics or decisions under uncertainty
